hero.title: Integrative Medicine. Longevity. Medical Innovation.
hero.lede: Personalized, evidence-based care designed to support long-term health, prevention, and the synthesis of emerging medical science.

approach.title: A Comprehensive Approach
approach.lede: We bridge traditional clinical excellence and emerging medical technology to care for the whole person.

one.d: Deep evaluation of medical history, lifestyle, and biological markers.

two.d: Analyzing the interplay of biological systems to find true drivers of health status.

three.d: Protocols integrating nutrition, pharmacology, and medical technology.

four.d: Continuous monitoring and iterative care for sustained wellbeing.

conditions.title: Conditions & Health Goals
conditions.lede: Areas of care we evaluate and support through an integrative, evidence-based lens.

footer.tagline: Evidence-based care for a healthier, longer life.
footer.rights: © 2026 JC Integrative Health. All Rights Reserved.
footer.newsletterCopy: Curated insights on integrative medicine, longevity, research and medical innovation.

demo: Demo content — not real medical or personal data.

about.title: An institute of integrative medicine, longevity, and medical innovation.
about.lede: JC Integrative Health is a clinical practice grounded in evidence, informed by research, and organized around the long-term health of each patient.

mission.d: To provide personalized, evidence-based care that supports long-term health, prevention, and quality of life.

vision.d: A model of care in which integrative medicine, longevity science, and medical innovation converge into practical, thoughtful clinical practice.

philosophy.d: Care that begins with careful listening, is guided by evidence, and remains responsive to the individual — not to trends.

evidence.d: Integrative approaches held to the same standards of evidence and accountability as any other area of medicine.

personalized.d: Recognition that each person's biology, context, and priorities are different, and that care should reflect that.

prevention.d: A long view of health — measuring what matters, acting early, and prioritizing sustained function.

innovation.d: Considered use of new diagnostics, therapies, and technologies as they mature into responsible clinical tools.

multilingual.d: Clinical communication in English, Spanish, Portuguese, and Mandarin so that language does not stand between patients and care.

locations.d: In-person visits in Colorado and Washington; telehealth for eligible patients across supported states.

education.d: Active involvement in teaching and public health literacy through university lectures and clinical mentorship.

research.d: Continuous engagement with published research, clinical trials, and evidence review.

patient.d: A calm, respectful clinical environment that values time, clarity, and dignity.

contact.title: How can we help?
contact.lede: Choose the inquiry type that best matches your request. We do not monitor this form for medical emergencies.
contact.success: Thank you. Your message has been received (demo). We reply to legitimate inquiries within a few business days.
contact.consent: I consent to being contacted about my inquiry and understand this form is not monitored for emergencies.
contact.disclaimer: Do not submit sensitive medical information through this form. For medical emergencies, call 911 or your local emergency service.

patient.d: Questions about visits, portal, and billing.
